sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77297" key="pa/ndeilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰ´ν-δειλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n77297.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all-cowardly, all-miserable</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:141" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">141</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:230" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.230</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
